requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity — CERT-RS / SBPOK Advisory (No Mandatory Product Certification)
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全——CERT-RS / SBPOK建议（暂无强制产品认证）
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全——CERT-RS / SBPOK建議（暫無強制產品認證）

summary.en: Serbia does not yet have a mandatory cybersecurity certification scheme for consumer IoT and wireless devices equivalent to the EU's RED Article 3.3(d)-(f) / EN 18031 mandatory requirements (effective 1 August 2025 in the EU). The national cybersecurity authority is SBPOK (Information Security Agency of Serbia), and the national CERT is CERT-RS. While specific product-level IoT security certification is not currently mandated for general consumer wireless devices, CERT-RS issues cybersecurity advisories and guidelines that are relevant to network-connected products. Serbia, as an EU accession candidate, may progressively adopt EU cybersecurity product requirements. ATJ (Agency for Testing and Certification of Information Security) handles security product certification for in-scope security products, which is separate from general consumer IoT. Exporters should monitor regulatory developments.
summary.zh: 塞尔维亚尚未建立针对消费类物联网和无线设备的强制网络安全认证体系，与欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条/EN 18031强制要求（欧盟2025年8月1日起生效）尚不对等。国家网络安全主管机构为SBPOK（塞尔维亚信息安全署），国家CERT为CERT-RS。目前，普通消费类无线设备层面的物联网安全产品认证尚未强制要求，但CERT-RS发布了与网络连接产品相关的网络安全建议和指南。塞尔维亚作为欧盟入盟候选国，可能逐步采纳欧盟网络安全产品要求。出口商应持续关注监管动态。ATJ（信息安全测试认证机构）负责范围内安全产品的安全认证，与普通消费类物联网分开处理。
summary.zht: 塞爾維亞尚未建立針對消費類物聯網和無線設備的強制網路安全認證體系，與歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條/EN 18031強制要求（歐盟2025年8月1日起生效）尚不對等。國家網路安全主管機構為SBPOK（塞爾維亞信息安全署），國家CERT為CERT-RS。目前，普通消費類無線設備層面的物聯網安全產品認證尚未強制要求，但CERT-RS發布了與網路連接產品相關的網路安全建議和指南。塞爾維亞作為歐盟入盟候選國，可能逐步採納歐盟網路安全產品要求。出口商應持續關注監管動態。ATJ（信息安全測試認證機構）負責範圍內安全產品的安全認證，與普通消費類物聯網分開處理。

standards_or_laws: Law on Information Security (Republic of Serbia, Official Gazette No. 6/2016, 94/2017)
SBPOK (Information Security Agency of Serbia) — national cybersecurity authority
CERT-RS — National Computer Emergency Response Team Serbia (advisories and guidelines)
ATJ (Agency for Testing and Certification of Information Security) — in-scope security product certification
ETSI EN 303 645 (consumer IoT cybersecurity — advisory benchmark, not yet mandated in Serbia)

summary.en: China has mandatory cybersecurity requirements for network-connected products under MIIT and the Cybersecurity Law, including MLPS (Multi-Level Protection Scheme) obligations for systems, and emerging mandatory cybersecurity product certification for certain IoT categories under CNCA. GB/T 36951 (IoT security) and MIIT smart device security requirements are applicable benchmarks.
summary.zh: 中国对联网产品设有MIIT及《网络安全法》下的强制网络安全要求，包括系统层面的等级保护（MLPS）义务，以及CNCA针对特定物联网类别推出的新兴强制网络安全产品认证。GB/T 36951（物联网安全）和MIIT智能设备安全要求是适用基准。
summary.zht: 中國對聯網產品設有MIIT及《網路安全法》下的強制網路安全要求，包括系統層面的等級保護（MLPS）義務，以及CNCA針對特定物聯網類別推出的新興強制網路安全產品認證。GB/T 36951（物聯網安全）和MIIT智能設備安全要求是適用基準。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017)
MLPS — Multi-Level Protection Scheme (等级保护) — systems-level obligation
GB/T 36951-2018 — IoT security reference model and general requirements
MIIT Measures on the Administration of Smart Connected Vehicle Cybersecurity (product-level, sector-specific)
CNCA emerging mandatory cybersecurity certification for select IoT product categories

gap.en: Serbia currently has no mandatory IoT device cybersecurity product certification equivalent to China's emerging CNCA mandatory scheme or the EU's mandatory RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f) requirements. However, Serbia's EU accession trajectory means mandatory cybersecurity product requirements may be adopted in the medium term. Chinese GB/T 36951 or MIIT cybersecurity certifications are not recognised in Serbia, nor required. Exporters should conduct voluntary compliance against ETSI EN 303 645 or CERT-RS advisories as a best-practice risk mitigation ahead of potential future mandatory requirements.
gap.zh: 塞尔维亚目前没有与中国新兴CNCA强制方案或欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条强制要求等效的物联网设备网络安全产品强制认证。但塞尔维亚的欧盟入盟进程意味着中期内可能采纳强制网络安全产品要求。中国GB/T 36951或MIIT网络安全认证在塞尔维亚不被认可，也暂无要求。出口商应参照ETSI EN 303 645或CERT-RS建议进行自愿合规，作为应对潜在未来强制要求的最佳实践风险缓解措施。
gap.zht: 塞爾維亞目前沒有與中國新興CNCA強制方案或歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條強制要求等效的物聯網設備網路安全產品強制認證。但塞爾維亞的歐盟入盟進程意味著中期內可能採納強制網路安全產品要求。中國GB/T 36951或MIIT網路安全認證在塞爾維亞不被認可，也暫無要求。出口商應參照ETSI EN 303 645或CERT-RS建議進行自願合規，作為應對潛在未來強制要求的最佳實踐風險緩解措施。

source.publisher: CERT-RS — National Computer Emergency Response Team Serbia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Serbia does not currently mandate cybersecurity product certification for general consumer wireless / IoT devices. CERT-RS issues non-binding advisories; SBPOK oversees national information security policy. Voluntary alignment with ETSI EN 303 645 or CERT-RS guidelines is recommended as a risk mitigation measure, given Serbia's EU accession candidacy and the likelihood of future mandatory requirements mirroring EU RED Art. 3.3(d)-(f). Chinese GB/T 36951 or MIIT cybersecurity documentation is not required or recognised. Monitor SBPOK and RATEL announcements for regulatory changes.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 塞尔维亚目前未对普通消费类无线/物联网设备强制要求网络安全产品认证。CERT-RS发布非约束性建议，SBPOK负责监督国家信息安全政策。考虑到塞尔维亚的入盟候选国地位及未来可能镜像欧盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)条强制要求的可能性，建议自愿参照ETSI EN 303 645或CERT-RS指南作为风险缓解措施。中国GB/T 36951或MIIT网络安全文件在塞尔维亚不作要求，也不被认可。请持续关注SBPOK和RATEL的法规动态公告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 塞爾維亞目前未對普通消費類無線/物聯網設備強制要求網路安全產品認證。CERT-RS發布非約束性建議，SBPOK負責監督國家信息安全政策。考慮到塞爾維亞的入盟候選國地位及未來可能鏡像歐盟RED第3.3(d)-(f)條強制要求的可能性，建議自願參照ETSI EN 303 645或CERT-RS指南作為風險緩解措施。中國GB/T 36951或MIIT網路安全文件在塞爾維亞不作要求，也不被認可。請持續關注SBPOK和RATEL的法規動態公告。
